headline: Federal Realty Expands West Coast Leadership As Valuation Gap Attracts Attention
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust appointed Jeff Kreshek as Executive Vice President, Western Region President & Chief Operating Officer. The move follows a period of record leasing activity, major asset acquisitions, and expanded residential development plans. The new role concentrates leadership over Federal Realty's West Coast operations at a time of active portfolio growth. For investors tracking NYSE:FRT, the leadership change sits against a share price of $107.55 and a mixed set of...
